_comment: Demo tag database for the multi-station SCADA stack (scripts/55_run_scada.sh). Point names match config/scada.json. All drivers are 'stub' so the whole pipeline runs with no PLC on the bench: analog points jitter so they stay 'fresh' and their stations read ONLINE, while station plc3 is marked 'down' so it goes OFFLINE in the HMI. Controllable points (plc1_brk, plc1_avr, plc4_stat) carry a 'control' block: with a stub the command loops back through STUB_STATE so the read-back reflects the operator command; with modbus, set control.kind (coil|holding|float32) and control.register to the PLC write target. Replace stub entries with modbus entries to feed from real PLCs; see ingest/tags.4plc.example.json.

tags._note: plc3 is marked down: ingest cannot read it, so its points stop updating and the station reads OFFLINE in the HMI
